notes:
Followed a workaround by hornerwl ( https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1048#issuecomment-417875072 )

Game ID for CS2 is 748490, not 538680 (of CS1), so that's the difference.

Within winecfg settings, I set the system to Windows 10. I am not sure if making it as Windows 7 would make a difference.

Despite the comment in github, configuration tool works at launch, at least in my environment.

This even worked finte with DualShock 4 via bluetooth.

Very rare freeze (happened once in ten hours+ of play time)
Auto save does not appear to be working, so save often manually!
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II

notes: Game launches but the opening video is glitched. You can skip it and enter the game but it runs at a terrible framerate unless playing with v-sync on portable settings.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II

notes: The only tweak necessary is installing lav-filters codecs to your wine prefix to fix the OP song cutscene. You won't be missing anything else if you decide not to. Runs on Max settings out of the box.
title: The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II
